'''Karin Orlan''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in command of the New Republic [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Resolve (frigate)|''Resolve'']]. She was from [[Quian]]. Her son was the criminal [[Benald Orlan]]. Her husband and other children were killed on Quian when Benald betrayed them to the Empire.<ref name="AJ1" />
